title: fsstore atomic write (tmp + fsync + rename) (CRITICAL PATH)
acceptance_criteria: Write path: <id>.json.tmp.<pid>.<ts> → fsync → POSIX rename to <id>.json (§6 Layer 1).
store_test.go covers: write-then-read round-trip; reading a missing item returns ErrNotFound; tmp files left on disk after a simulated crash do not appear under Get/List.
Filenames use only the canonical id (no path traversal possible).
